

-- go.mod --
module example.com
go 1.24

-- foo/foo.go --
package foo

func Sub(a, b int) int { return a - b } //@loc(defSubGo, "Sub")

-- foo/foo.s --
TEXT ·CallSub(SB), $0-16
    MOVQ $10, AX
    MOVQ $3, BX
    MOVQ AX, a+0(FP)
    MOVQ BX, b+8(FP)
    CALL ·Sub(SB) //@loc(callSubAsm, "·Sub")
    RET
